objective: [Momentum] sur 0GUSDC en 1h. Indicateurs : EMA + OBV + STOCHASTIC. Entrées : EMA(10) crossover EMA(30), OBV > 1h MA, STOCHASTIC <20% OVERBOUGHT (Keltner combo). Sorties : Vwap > 87%, Momentum RSI > 65. Risk management: SL = Entry + 1 Standard Deviation, TP = Entry - 4 Standard Deviations. Objectif: Obtenir des gains en profitant de la force du mouvement avec une volatilité contrôlée et un risque limité.

pre_reflection.text: [Pre-reflection] This strategy uses Momentum, EMA and Stochastic indicators along with other risk management features. Weaknesses could include overfitting or underperformance in different market conditions. In case of poor results, changing the entry criteria to a momentum crossover above 60 might be considered as an alternative. For mediocre Sharpe ratio, adjustments on stop loss value or taking profit level may help improve performance.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The proposed strategy uses momentum, volume and volatility indicators to generate trading opportunities in trending market conditions. The EMA crossover entry rule can capture strong directional moves, while the OBV overbought/oversold condition and Stochastic RSI exit rules help identify potential trend reversals. However, some possible weaknesses of this strategy could include its sensitivity to outliers or noise in the data, as well as its susceptibility to whipsaws if not managed properly. If results are poor (negative return), a specific change that can be tried is adjusting the EMA parameters for smoother signals and reducing the OBV overbought/oversold threshold. For mediocre Sharpe ratio, parameter adjustments such as tweaking Stochastic RSI exit rules or considering more advanced volatility measures could help improve performance.
[Backup plan] In case of failure of this strategy, we can consider other momentum-based strategies that use different combinations of indicators like moving average convergence divergence (MACD) and relative strength index (RSI), incorporating market depth data to better estimate liquidity, or using machine learning algorithms for trend identification. Additionally, we could also diversify our portfolio across different types of strategies or asset classes to reduce risk.
